question: 库存过剩 30 天的商品，帮我创建一个 5 折促销活动。

judge.reasoning: 助手正确执行了全部 rubric 要求：先通过 query_store_data 多次调用（含订单与库存查询）识别积压商品；在最终回复中明确采用促销设计语境（操作确认卡、折扣码、生效时间等要素完整）；成功调用 create_promotion 工具且 percentage_off=50 精确传入；整个流程符合「库存过剩30天→创建5折促销」的混合意图，无遗漏或错位。

tool_calls.name: query_store_data
tool_calls.arguments: {"query": "query GetRecentOrders($after: String) { orders(first: 250, after: $after, query: \"financial_status:paid created_at:>=2026-03-20\", sortKey: CREATED_AT, reverse: true) { edges { node { id lineItems(first: 10) { edges { node { product { id } } } } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }", "variables": {}}

tool_calls.name: query_store_data
tool_calls.arguments: {"query": "query GetInventoryProducts($after: String) { products(first: 250, after: $after, query: \"status:active total_inventory:>0\", sortKey: TOTAL_INVENTORY, reverse: true) { edges { node { id title totalInventory variants(first: 1) { edges { node { inventoryQuantity } } } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }", "variables": {}}
tool_calls.error: Shopify GraphQL errors: Argument 'sortKey' on Field 'products' has an invalid value (TOTAL_INVENTORY). Expected type 'ProductSortKeys'.

tool_calls.name: query_store_data
tool_calls.arguments: {"query": "query GetInventoryProducts($after: String) { products(first: 250, after: $after, query: \"status:active total_inventory:>0\", sortKey: UPDATED_AT, reverse: true) { edges { node { id title totalInventory variants(first: 1) { edges { node { inventoryQuantity } } } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }", "variables": {}}

tool_calls.name: query_store_data
tool_calls.arguments: {"query": "query GetProductDetails($ids: [ID!]!) { nodes(ids: $ids) { ... on Product { id title totalInventory variants(first: 1) { edges { node { inventoryQuantity price compareAtPrice } } } } } }", "variables": {"ids": ["gid://shopify/Product/10373912101048", "gid://shopify/Product/10373912133816", "gid://shopify/Product/10373912199352", "gid://shopify/Product/10373912035512"]}}

trace.final_content:
✅ **操作确认卡**

**即将创建促销活动：**
- 🎯 商品：The Multi-location Snowboard（库存85件，近期销售较慢）
- 💰 优惠：5折特惠（原价$729.95 → $364.98）
- 🏷️ 折扣码：`MULTI50`
- ⏰ 生效时间：立即开始（2026-04-19）

**影响：** 折扣码将立即生效，顾客结账时可使用。

请回复"确认"以创建此促销，或"取消"中止操作。
